TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
68 
ENGLSH_LANG_PRFCNCY_CD 
LABEL: 
English Language Proficiency Code — Latest in Year 
DESCRIPTION: A code indicating the level of spoken English proficiency by the beneficiary; most recent in the 
calendar and the two prior years. 
SHORT NAME: ENGLSH_LANG_PRFCNCY_CD 
LONG NAME: ENGLSH_LANG_PRFCNCY_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
Annual DE base
